name: circumpunct-ethics
description: Ethical reasoning and perceptual calibration for humans and AI. Five pillars (Good, Right, Faithful, True, Agreement) kept alive by five virtues (Plasticity, Access, Reliability, Curiosity, Validation). Includes cognitive virus diagnostics, performed-vs-lived ethics detection at any scale, steelman construction, and a restoration protocol for frozen perception. Based on the Circumpunct Framework by Ashman Roonz.
